description: Puppeteer automation navigator: current API from live docs (pptr.dev), link map (page API, waitForSelector, request interception, puppeteer.connect over CDP, puppeteer-extra stealth), robust-automation patterns, and attaching to an anti-detect browser (AdsPower/Kameleo) via browserWSEndpoint. Includes /puppeteer:check and a Puppeteer-keyword reminder hook. Defers general third-party doc verification to api-docs-first.

interface.longDescription:

Codex fidelity: 3 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
